summary: 0.6.33 keeps the simple button 5 behavior from 0.6.32 and adds a safe interaction-layer polish: while the override is held, the player temporarily suppresses its own hosted screen and control colliders.
operatorSignals: 0.6.32 simplified the behavior appropriately, but grab-nav still felt locked while looking at the screen.
The next safe route was to stop the player from acting like an interactive target while button 5 is held, instead of adding more navigation-state logic.
actionsTaken: Kept the simple button 5 focus-disable rule from 0.6.32.
Added a hosted-surface helper to resolve the player-owned interaction colliders for the screen and control surface.
Temporarily disabled those colliders while the override is held and restored their prior enabled states on release.
nonGoals: No A-B or transport policy changes.
